ingestion_verdict.note: INCONCLUSIVE: free route shows audio_tokens=0, pitch does not significantly track GT, and the no-audio control confabulates the same kind of answer. Cannot distinguish 'model is pitch-deaf' from 'audio not decoded on this route'. A valid B6 needs a confirmed-audio route (base Qwen2-Audio via the R3 Modal app, or paid Gemini/GPT-4o-audio).
